Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Tony Hoare has died 1874 upvotes, 246 comments
  2. Mesh over Bluetooth LE, TCP, or Reticulum 115 upvotes, 14 comments
  3. Standardizing source maps 56 upvotes, 5 comments
  4. U+237C ⍼ Is Azimuth 352 upvotes, 59 comments
  5. Julia Snail – An Emacs Development Environment for Julia Like Clojure's Cider 112 upvotes, 15 comments
  6. AutoKernel: Autoresearch for GPU Kernels 39 upvotes, 8 comments
  7. TADA: Fast, Reliable Speech Generation Through Text-Acoustic Synchronization 71 upvotes, 19 comments
  8. Building a TB-303 from Scratch 133 upvotes, 43 comments
  9. Universal vaccine against respiratory infections and allergens 304 upvotes, 113 comments
  10. Cloudflare crawl endpoint 370 upvotes, 142 comments
  11. AI Agent Hacks McKinsey 19 upvotes, 3 comments
  12. Surpassing vLLM with a Generated Inference Stack 50 upvotes, 16 comments
  13. SSH Secret Menu 264 upvotes, 119 comments
  14. Writing my own text editor, and daily-driving it 145 upvotes, 62 comments
  15. Zig – Type Resolution Redesign and Language Changes 316 upvotes, 151 comments
  16. Levels of Agentic Engineering 226 upvotes, 104 comments
  17. Lego's 0.002 mm Specification and Its Implications for Manufacturing 29 upvotes, 8 comments
  18. PeppyOS: A simpler alternative to ROS 2 (now with containers support) 23 upvotes, 6 comments
  19. Whistleblower: DOGE member took Social Security data to new job 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. When the chain becomes the product: Seven years inside a token-funded venture 28 upvotes, 9 comments
  21. Launch HN: RunAnywhere (YC W26) – Faster AI Inference on Apple Silicon 226 upvotes, 133 comments
  22. Create value for others and don’t worry about the returns 501 upvotes, 341 comments
  23. Microsoft BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs 87 upvotes, 48 comments
  24. Debian decides not to decide on AI-generated contributions 351 upvotes, 264 comments
  25. Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world 521 upvotes, 434 comments
  26. RISC-V Is Sloooow 272 upvotes, 291 comments
  27. Show HN: Custom Git-receive-pack implementation 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Agents that run while I sleep 369 upvotes, 420 comments
  29. Roblox is minting teen millionaires 182 upvotes, 222 comments
  30. Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure 21 upvotes, 33 comments

Last generated 10:00pm, 11 March 2026. Source here.
